nasb.text: Sun and moon stood in their places; They went away at the light of Your arrows, At the radiance of Your gleaming spear.

esv.text: The sun and moon stood still in their place at the light of your arrows as they sped, at the flash of your glittering spear.

cnv.text: 日月停在本位， 你的箭發射如光； 你的矛閃爍輝耀。

ccb.text: 你射出的箭闪闪发光， 你的枪熠熠生辉， 以致日月都停在天上。
